lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Experience automotive perfection with this stunning, showroom-quality vehicle! It is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it left the factory. Meticulously cared for and virtually indistinguishable from new, this is a rare find for any discerning buyer seeking the absolute best.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained throughout its life. The exterior is clean overall, though it shows some expected signs of use such as minor stone chips on the front bumper and small surface scratches consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is well-cared for with only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly and has a consistent service history, making it a dependable choice for a new owner.

The vehicle is in good condition. The body is well-maintained with only minor cosmetic wear and no major damage. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are reliable and have been regularly serviced. The interior is clean and shows minimal wear.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has been used as a dependable daily driver. The exterior is generally in good shape but does show some signs of its age, including minor door dings and some light scratches on the hood and rear bumper. Inside, the cabin is clean, though there is noticeable wear on the driver's seat and the carpet in the footwells. Mechanically, the car is functional and drives smoothly, but it is due for a standard service soon and the brake pads are nearing the end of their life. This is an honest car for someone looking for reliable transportation with a few cosmetic imperfections.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a distinguished balance of performance and aesthetic integrity. This automobile has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical reliability and consistent road manners. The interior cabin reflects meticulous care, while the exterior maintains a professional, high-caliber presence. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning individual seeking a dependable and sophisticated driving experience.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner! It runs super smoothly and has been well-loved over the years. If you're looking for a reliable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have!

Offered is a mechanically sound 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six. This high-revving power unit utilizes individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system for linear power delivery up to the 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a subframe reinforcement
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, perfect for someone looking for a dependable daily driver that still turns heads. The exterior paint retains a deep gloss, with only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved; the leather seats show minimal bolstering wear, and all electronic features—including the premium sound system and climate control—are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is sound. It has been serviced regularly at recommended intervals, with a recent oil change and a fresh set of all-season tires installed just last season. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts crisply without hesitation. While there are a few faint scratches near the trunk loading area, the overall presentation is excellent. This is a smoke-free, pet-free vehicle that has been garage-kept and treated

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and road-ready performance. Its aesthetic condition remains impressive, showcasing consistent care and attention to detail. We invite serious inquiries to experience the refined handling and reliability of this exceptional motorcar.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a seamless blend of performance and reliability. It has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and interior comfort. An exceptional acquisition for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It's been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really solid shape! It runs great and has been well-taken care of over the years. This is the perfect find for someone who wants a dependable vehicle that's ready for many more adventures. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 powered by the high-revving S54B32 power plant, featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This example utilizes a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox delivering power to the rear wheels via a variable M differential lock. The chassis remains taut with a MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension geometry. Recent preventative maintenance includes subframe reinforcement and rod bearing service. While showing light patina consistent with a well-driven enthusiast vehicle, the compression across all six cylinders remains within factory specifications, ensuring peak atmospheric induction performance.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a brilliant luster, showing only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and well-kept. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium leather upholstery is supple, and every electronic feature—from the responsive navigation system to the dual-zone climate control—operates flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready. It features a complete service record, a recently performed oil change, and tires with substantial tread remaining. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride that reflects a history of dedicated preventative maintenance. This is an ideal find for a discerning buyer who values a well-cared-for vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Rigorously inspected to ensure reliable performance and long-term value, this selection balances sophisticated engineering with proven durability.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure compliance with our exacting standards. It offers a definitive balance of sophisticated performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car for me. It’s in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend getaway! I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road immediately with its next lucky owner. Come take it for a spin; you’re going to love how smooth it handles!

This E46 M3 represents a superb driver’s example, powered by the legendary S54 3.2L straight-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a high-compression ratio for peak naturally aspirated performance. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox and a functional variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Recent service highlights include a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and reinforced subframe mounting points to address common platform stress. The suspension geometry remains true, delivering the tactile feedback and balanced handling characteristics these chassis are renowned for. A mechanically robust specimen ready for the open road.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Reliable performance. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Ready for immediate use.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal, meticulously maintained to ensure it remains in solid standing for its next owner. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor, expected road wear that does not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the upholstery is free of tears, the dashboard remains crack-free, and every electronic component—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, reflecting a consistent history of professional servicing and preventative maintenance. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. With a fresh set of tires and all fluids recently topped off, this car is truly turn-key and ready for the road. We have kept detailed service records to provide complete peace of mind regarding its mechanical integrity.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity to acquire a well-maintained automobile characterized by mechanical integrity and consistent performance. Our professional assessment confirms that this unit has been preserved to a high standard, offering a refined driving experience and a clean, executive aesthetic. It stands as a testament to diligent ownership, providing the next steward with a reliable and sophisticated transport solution. We invite you to review this exceptional offering, which balances proven durability with contemporary comfort.

This refined vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical order, this unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure continued reliability and peak performance. The exterior and interior finishes remain in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent ownership. A sophisticated choice for those seeking the perfect synthesis of luxury and enduring value.

Hi everyone! I’m parting ways with my favorite ride, and it’s honestly in such great shape! It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream, making it perfect for your next adventure. You’re going to love how it handles on the road. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L DOHC inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains taut with Bilstein B16 dampers and reinforced subframe mounts to address common chassis fatigue. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual and a factory limited-slip differential. Recent service includes a comprehensive Vanos overhaul and valve adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates within tight tolerances. The exterior shows minor road wear consistent with driver-focused use, but the mechanicals are dialed for performance. A balanced, driver-grade example optimized for the purist.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of performance and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor, age-appropriate imperfections, while the interior is exceptionally clean, featuring supple upholstery and a smoke-free environment. Under the hood, the engine is robust and quiet, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and a recent full-service inspection. All onboard electronics, including the premium audio system and navigation, function flawlessly. With excellent tire tread remaining and a smooth-shifting transmission, this car provides a confident and comfortable driving experience. It is a reliable, high-quality choice for anyone seeking a turn-key vehicle that has been treated with genuine pride of ownership.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which offers a distinguished balance of performance and aesthetic refinement. Thoroughly inspected to ensure mechanical excellence and long-term reliability, this unit represents a superior value proposition for the discerning driver who prioritizes both sophistication and functional integrity.
